case_title: JEAN-PIERRE PAGADOY vs. BRANNAN MEAT COMPANY, CA/CO DBA CALIF. MEAT CO.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEAN-PIERRE PAGADOY AS TO DEFENDANT BRANNAN MEAT COMPANY, CA/CO DBA CALIF. MEAT CO.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEAN-PIERRE PAGADOY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRANNAN MEAT COMPANY, CA/CO DBA CALIF. MEAT CO. $3,508.55 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,588.55
